name: cross-prune
description: Lean full-stack API reachability auditor that reports evidence-backed prune candidates without deleting code.

scripts.prepublish-check: npm test && npm pack --dry-run && git status --short && ! grep -RInE "$HOME|A[P]I_KEY=|T[O]KEN=|S[E]CRET=|P[A]SSWORD=|C[O]OKIE=|A[U]THORIZATION=|P[R]IVATE_URL=" --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=reports --exclude-dir=cross-prune-test --exclude=package-lock.json .
